differential_diagnoses: Vitamin B6 deficiency associated with malabsorption
next_steps: Obtain rheumatoid factor and anti-CCP antibody testing
Perform arthrocentesis and synovial fluid analysis
Perform a nerve and muscle biopsy to evaluate for necrotizing vasculitis
Complete laboratory panel including ANA, ANCA, complement levels, and cryoglobulins
Order CT chest, abdomen, and pelvis to screen for occult malignancy
Obtain comprehensive neurological imaging (MRI) with sedation to ensure adequate diagnostic quality
Continue aggressive pain management and vitamin B6 supplementation
